title: uragoga amplectens
side_effects: Uragoga amplectens can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its toxic properties. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Long-term misuse may also cause liver damage, kidney failure, and respiratory issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Uragoga amplectens for any health benefits.
